item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: All students who have enrolled in a summer course, an important meeting will be held on Monday June 8th at 1pm in the atrium. See a Teams message from Mr. Spence for more details!

item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: With the warm weather that is now upon us, we must still be in school uniform. Teachers, please send any students who are not in uniform to the office. Grade 12s are permitted to wear their STA sweaters for the month of June.

item.title: Another message from the main office:
item.description: Please make sure all locks are locked and on your lockers!

item.title: A message from Mr. Cornellier:
item.description: A reminder for all members of the slo-pitch team. Don't forget to bring your pants and jersey as soon as possible.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: A final reminder for all former students of Madame Laroche at St. Mother Teresa, today is your last opportunity to sign her retirement gift. Please drop by room 127 today at lunch to add your name!

item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder to students that have borrowed uniform items from the office, they must be returned as soon as possible.

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: Could the High school dance team please see Mme Bourdon at the main foyer right after annoucements for a 5 minute meeting.
